content:
6. (1)
The allowances and privileges granted under this Act shall
not be assignable or transferable, or liable to be attached,
sequestrated or levied upon in respect of any claim.
(2)
The Income Tax Act 1967 [Act 53] shall not apply to the
allowances and privileges granted under this Act.
Istana Negara (Royal Allowances)                           7
Amendment of Schedules
7.
The Cabinet may by order amend the Schedules from time to
time.
Repeal

8. The  Special  Pensions  (Raja  Permaisuri  Agong)  Act  1979
[Act 223]  is  repealed.
FIRST  SCHEDULE
PART I
Former Yang di-Pertuan Agong:
Istana Negara Royal Allowance     …   …   …   …    RM20,250.00 per month
PART II
Former Raja Permaisuri Agong:
Istana Negara Royal Allowance     …   …   …   …     RM6,750.00 per  month
8                                       Laws of Malaysia                            ACT 270
SECOND  SCHEDULE
(a) a lump sum of RM2,590.87 per month for maintenance of car and
employment of driver and household staff;
(b) a car (free of registration fee and of motor vehicle licence fee), or in
lieu thereof a lump sum car allowance of RM250,000 and an exemption
of motor vehicle licence fee on one car registered under her name, and;
(c) rent-free accommodation in Government quarters to be maintained by
the Government or in lieu thereof a lump sum house allowance of
RM750,000.

01-11-2001

1. This Act may be cited as the Istana Negara (Royal Allowances)
Act 1982 and shall be deemed to have come into force on 1 July
1981.
Allowance for former Yang di-Pertuan Agong

2. There shall be paid to a Ruler who has held the office of Yang
di-Pertuan Agong, for the duration of his life, the monthly allowance
specified in Part I of  the First Schedule.
Allowance for former Raja Permaisuri Agong

3. (1)
There shall be paid to the Consort of a Ruler, who has held
the office of Raja Permaisuri Agong, for the duration of her life, the
monthly allowance  specified in Part II of the First Schedule.
6                                       Laws of Malaysia                            ACT 270
(2)
If the Yang di-Pertuan Agong dies while in office, there
shall be granted to his Consort who is holding the office of Raja
Permaisuri Agong at the time of the death of such Yang di-Pertuan
Agong the allowances and privileges specified in the Second
Schedule for the duration of her life in addition to the monthly
allowance payable under subsection (1).
Payment

4. The monthly allowances payable under section 2 and
subsection 3(1) shall—
(a) accrue from day to day; and
(b) be payable monthly on the last day of each month or on
such other  day of the month as the Minister of Finance
may from time to  time  determine.
Charge on the Consolidated Fund

5. The sums required for the payments under this Act shall be
charged on the Consolidated Fund.
Allowances not assignable, etc., and non-application of the
Income Tax Act 1967
